summary: Reordered the read-write SQLite DSN so busy_timeout precedes journal_mode, matching OpenReadOnly.
reason: Pragmas execute in DSN order; the WAL switch on a fresh database ran before any busy timeout was set, losing first-run races under parallel command invocation (observed as SQLITE_BUSY in the scorecard sampler).
validated_outcome: Parallel first-run invocations no longer hit SQLITE_BUSY; full test suite green.
